apps.name: Claude Tracker
apps.subtitle: Usage bars for Claude, inside Safari.
apps.localizedDescription:
Adds an inline panel to claude.ai showing your ~token count, cache timer, and session (5h) and weekly (7d) usage bars that fill in real time. No account, no data collection.

After installing, enable it in Settings > Apps > Claude Tracker (and in Safari extension settings), then open claude.ai.

versions.localizedDescription: Settings panel (gear icon): 7 languages (EN/IT/ZH/JA/RU/PT/AR), bar color presets, stacked layout option. Live author profile + funding goal. Full-width bars on narrow screens by default.
